mapper.insert:
INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0403-03_2#Sql001 */ INTO CORDYS.FUND_RESERVE_SETTING( BUTEN_CODE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , FUND_CD_KAISU , FUND_CD_GOU , AZUKARI_KBN , MODIFY_KBN , PAYMENT_METHOD , NISA_BARELY_BUYING_KBN , NISA_EXCESS_BUYING_KBN , SETTING_AMOUNT , COURSE_KBN , SETTING_RESERVE_DD , SETTING_RESERVE_BIMONTHLY , SETTING_RESERVE_WEEKLY , SETTING_RESERVE_MULTIDAY , ONE_MONTH_SUM_AMOUNT , SETTING_BONUS_FLAG , PAYMENT_BONUS , RESERVE_MM_B1 , RESERVE_DD_B1 , RESERVE_MM_B2 , RESERVE_DD_B2 , PLAN_DATE , PLAN_DATE_BONUS1 , PLAN_DATE_BONUS2 , NEXT_RESERVE_DATE , KANYU_KBN , UKETUKE_HOUHOU , CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT , RECEPTION_ROUTE_KBN , OPERATOR_ID , BROKER_CODE , INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD , DELETE_KBN , CREATE_TIME , CREATE_USER , UPDATE_TIME , UPDATE_USER ) VALUES ( #{req.butenCode} ,#{req.accountNumber} ,#{req.fundCdKaisu} ,#{req.fundCdGou} ,#{req.azukariKbn} ,#{req.modifyKbn} ,#{req.paymentMethod} ,#{req.nisaBarelyBuyingKbn} ,#{req.nisaExcessBuyingKbn} ,TO_NUMBER(#{req.settingAmount}) ,#{req.courseKbn} ,#{req.settingReserveDd} ,#{req.settingReserveBimonthly} ,#{req.settingReserveWeekly} ,#{req.settingReserveMultiday}
,NULL
,TO_NUMBER(#{req.oneMonthSumAmount})
,#{req.settingBonusFlag}
,NULL
,TO_NUMBER(#{req.paymentBonus})
,#{req.reserveMmB1} ,#{req.reserveDdB1} ,#{req.reserveMmB2} ,#{req.reserveDdB2} ,#{req.planDate} ,#{req.planDateBonus1} ,#{req.planDateBonus2} ,#{req.nextReserveDate} ,#{req.kanyuKbn} ,#{req.uketukeHouhou} ,#{req.checkCompWrnAlert} ,#{req.receptionRouteKbn} ,#{req.operatorId} ,#{req.brokerCode} ,#{req.brokerChargeCode} ,#{req.deleteKbn} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.createUser} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.updateUser} )
